field.challenge_value_placeholder: Enter the target value for your challenge
field.description_placeholder: Describe your challenge to motivate yourself!
field.distance_description: Set a target distance for your challenge, like 100 km, to motivate yourself to ride more.
field.name_placeholder: Enter a name for your challenge
field.speed_description: Set a target speed for your challenge, like 25 km/h, to motivate yourself to improve your performance.
field.time_description: Set a target duration for your challenge, like 10 hours, to motivate yourself to spend more time riding.
field.total_duration_description: Set a total duration for your challenge, like 30 days, to motivate yourself to maintain a regular cycling routine.
field.total_duration_placeholder: Enter the total duration of the challenge

modal.update_progress_confirmation: Are you sure you want to update the progress of this challenge? Any previous progress will be overwritten.

errors.endDateBeforeStartDate: End date must be after start date

accessories.existingDescription: This component is already added to the bike's accessories.
accessories.usedDescription: This component is already used by another bike.

activities.completeConfirmation: Are you sure you want to mark this activity as completed?
activities.deleteRideConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this ride? This action cannot be undone.
activities.maintenanceBikeOrComponentRequired: Please select a bike or component for this maintenance.
activities.maintenanceDetailsDescription: Select the equipment affected by this maintenance to track its wear and receive future maintenance reminders.
activities.noActivityTypeMessage: Please select an activity type to add specific details to your activity and track your performance more accurately.
activities.noRideTypeMessage: Please select a ride type to add specific details to your ride and track your performance more accurately.
activities.noTypeDetails: No additional details required for this activity type.
activities.pastDate: You cannot add/edit activities for past dates.
activities.recurrenceIntervalHelperText: The recurrence interval is based on the selected frequency. You can adjust it as needed to create recurring activities that fit your schedule and goals.
activities.rideDetailsDescription: Enter the details of your ride, such as distance, duration, average speed, and elevation gain to track your performance and progress in cycling.
activities.rideRequiresBikeOrEquipment: This ride requires selecting a bike or gear to track your performance and receive maintenance reminders in the future.
activities.saveRideConfirmation: Are you sure you want to save this ride? Once saved, this ride will be added to your history and you will be able to track your performance and progress in your cycling practice.
activities.startMessage: Do you want start this output?
activities.startRideConfirmation: Are you sure you want to start this ride? The start time will be set to the current time.
activities.trainingDetailsDescription: Select the type of training you performed to track your progress and adjust your future workouts based on your cycling goals.
activities.ExitRideConfirmation: Are you sure you want to exit this ride? Unsaved data will be lost.

bike_status.unknown: ❓ Unknown condition - Add data to track wear

challenge.empty_description: Take on a challenge to stay motivated and achieve your cycling goals!

day_progress.daily_goal_duration_description: Set a duration value for your daily challenge, like 30 minutes, to motivate yourself to ride every day.
day_progress.daily_goal_reset_description: It will reset every day at midnight to allow you to take on a new daily challenge!
day_progress.description: Reach your daily cycling goal to stay fit and motivated!
day_progress.description_completed: Congratulations on reaching your daily cycling goal! Keep riding to stay fit and motivated!

legend.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this activity type? This action cannot be undone.
legend.deleteWithActivitiesConfirmation: This activity type has {{count}} associated activities. Are you sure you want to delete it? This action cannot be undone and will also delete all associated activities.
legend.helperText: Activity types allow you to categorize your rides and visualize them on the calendar with different colors. Create custom activity types to better organize your cycling activities and track your progress towards your goals!

typeColor.exists: An activity type with this color already exists.

preferred.label: Mark as preferred bike
preferred.labelDescription: The preferred bike will be used by default for new rides and displayed first in your bike list. Only one preferred bike is allowed.

reset_password.description: Enter the code sent to your email and set a new password
reset_password.invalid_code: The verification code is invalid or has expired. Please try again.
reset_password.password_requirements: The password must be at least 8 characters long, include an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter, and a number.

search_accessory.accessories_error: An error occurred while loading accessories. Please try again later.

services_methods_maintenances.description: Choose a method to schedule your maintenance tasks based on your preferences and equipment usage.

distanceInterval.helperText: This method uses the distance traveled to schedule the next maintenance tasks.
distanceInterval.label: Use the distance traveled to schedule the next maintenance tasks

manual.helperText: No automatic scheduling is performed for maintenance. Please manage maintenance tasks manually.
manual.label: Manual scheduling of maintenance tasks
manual.placeholderNote: Enter any notes or reminders for manual maintenance scheduling.

none.helperText: No automatic scheduling is performed for maintenance. Please manage maintenance tasks manually.
none.label: No automatic scheduling of maintenance tasks
none.placeholderNote: Enter any notes or reminders for manual maintenance scheduling.

ridesInterval.helperText: This method uses the number of rides to schedule the next maintenance tasks.
ridesInterval.label: Use the number of rides to schedule the next maintenance tasks

timeInterval.helperText: This method uses the elapsed time to schedule the next maintenance tasks.
timeInterval.label: Use the elapsed time to schedule the next maintenance tasks

services_methods_maintenances.title: Maintenance scheduling methods

useLastServiceDate.helperText: This method uses the date of the last service to schedule the next maintenance tasks.
useLastServiceDate.helperTextWithDate: Next service on: {{nextService}} (6 months after the last service date)
useLastServiceDate.label: Use the date of the last service to schedule the next maintenance tasks
